key_drivers: Iran war driving geopolitical risk premium in oil (CL bullish) and safe-haven JPY demand
Rising real yields (+5.1bps to 1.839%) and VIX spike (29.49, +37.55% in 5 days) crushing equity risk appetite
China PMI contraction (49.0, 2nd consecutive month) and risk-off environment hammering AUD and commodity currencies

fallbacks_used: CNBC US10YTIP for real-time real yields (1.839%)
data_quality.notes: Real yields at exact threshold (+5.1bps > 5bps = RISING). Gold ETF flows scored FLAT due to conflicting Feb inflows vs Mar 4 large outflow. Oil supply scored TIGHTENING due to Iran war disruption overriding inventory build.
